derived_from: problem: 94-must catalog collapsed into 21 flat pages / 42 TERs under expanded mode
slice_1_scope: Phase 2 promotion contract + anti-compression gate + data contract + CLI wiring + tests

gates.statement: A fixture mirroring the real collapse (13-topic family -> 1 leaf page, many must topics, too few TERs, flat hierarchy) fails deepwiki-scale with exit 3 and emits at least one of the new defect codes.
gates.pass_example: frontend family with 12 promoted leaf topics on one subsystem-deep-dive page -> leaf_page_overloaded + family_not_split + flat_hierarchy + missing TERs
gates.fail_example: gate returns passed=true for a 21-flat-page / 42-TER plan

gates.statement: A fanned-out fixture (each promoted leaf topic on its own <=cap leaf page with a TER, hierarchically linked, >= breadth floor) passes with exit 0 and no diagnostics.

An overview/index page listing many promoted ids passes only when each topic also has its own non-overview leaf page + TER; a topic appearing only on the overview page fails with promoted_topic_not_on_leaf_page.
baseline/enhancement/expanded behavior and their tests are unchanged; the anti-compression gate is not run (and its artifact not written) outside deepwiki-scale.
Two evaluations over identical inputs produce identical anti-compression-gate.json.
normalize-plan/plan-repair/retrieve-evidence/write-wiki accept --coverage-mode deepwiki-scale; downstream behaves as expanded in Slice 1.
Every catalog topic is assigned a tier (page/overview/optional/known_gap); promoted_topics[] emitted as the downstream data contract; deferred promoted topic is tier known_gap and non-blocking.
New code: explicit typing on public APIs, no mutable default args, no import-time side effects, injectable BreadthPolicy, no broad except, LLM-free/network-free/read-only.
gates.verified_by: code review + py_compile + import-safety + full suite

gates.statement: Protected Phase 3 spec unchanged; no existing validator weakened; no live/billed provider call.
gates.verified_by: git diff --exit-code on protected spec + review

gates.statement: Clean working tree: only intended deliverables changed; no stray caches/artifacts; git diff --check clean; definition-of-done.json valid JSON.
gates.verified_by: git status + git diff --check + python -m json.tool

out_of_scope_slice_1: Live billed run -> M4 with explicit user approval
